final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing WeChat official account article cover image for a fragrance new product launch campaign named "染秋".

Style/medium: needs a high-end, premium-quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be center composition with the title as the dominant focal element
Subject: must include the "染秋" fragrance new product launch theme
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a refined, luxurious mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-toned direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" (large, primary, centered)
Constraints: must be horizontal layout at 900×500 aspect ratio; title must be visually prominent
Avoid:
